nasb.text: It is like a mustard seed, which, when sown upon the soil, though it is smaller than all the seeds that are upon the soil,

esv.text: It is like a grain of mustard seed, which, when sown on the ground, is the smallest of all the seeds on earth,

cnv.text: 它好像一粒芥菜種，剛種下去的時候，比地上的一切種子都小，

ccb.text: 上帝的国就像一粒芥菜种。它是种子中最小的，

csbs.text: 它好像一粒芥菜种子，被种入地里的时候，比地上所有的种子更小，
